messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0033",
  "title": "头部超级产品缺位致使新品整体收入大幅缩水",
  "page_index": 11,
  "page_range": "11"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0034",
    "title": "2023年",
    "page_range": "11",
    "summary": "This section provides 2023 annual data, answering questions about the year's proportion/share (15.3%) and the ranked list of the top 5 new products. It retrieves the date (2023), the metric (15.3% share/proportion), and five specific entities (逆水寒, 崩坏：星穹铁道, 晶核, 冒险岛：枫之传说, 合金弹头：觉醒) with their exact rankings (1–5). It supports queries on product rankings, the 2023 percentage figure, and the identity of top new releases. Evidence types include a percentage metric and an ordered list; no definitions, procedures, tables, or figures are present."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0035",
    "title": "2024年",
    "page_range": "11",
    "summary": "This section covers 2024 annual data, answering questions about the year’s share/proportion (18.9%) and the top five new product rankings. It identifies the specific entities: 地下城与勇士：起源, 无尽冬日, 恋与深空, 三国：谋定天下, and 向僵尸开炮. The content provides a quantitative metric (18.9%) and an ordered list, supporting retrieval for queries on 2024 performance figures, new release rankings, and specific product titles. No definitions, procedures, tables, or figures are present."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0036",
    "title": "2025年",
    "page_range": "11-1",
    "summary": "This section details market performance and new product rankings for 2025. It supports retrieval for:\n- **Topics:** Annual market proportion/share and new product rankings.\n- **Dates:** 2025.\n- **Metrics:** 1.5% (annual proportion).\n- **Entities:** Top 5 new products: 燕云十六声, 英雄没有闪, 无畏契约：源能行动, 杖剑传说, 永远的蔚蓝星球.\n- **Figures:** Pie chart visualizing annual proportion (blue for the year's share, white for the remainder) alongside a ranked list of the top 5 new products with icons and names for cross-year comparison.\n- **Evidence Types:** Proprietary research and data visualization by 点点数据.\n- **Retrieval Questions Answered:** What was the market share/proportion in 2025? What were the top 5 new products in 2025? How is the 2025 data visualized and what is its source? (Definitions, procedures, claims, and tables are not present in this section.)"
  }
]

message.content: This section analyzes the significant decline in overall new product revenue attributed to the absence of top-tier super products, presenting annual market share data and top 5 new product rankings for 2023, 2024, and 2025. Topics covered include annual market proportion/share, new release performance rankings, and cross-year revenue trends. Dates referenced are 2023, 2024, and 2025. Key metrics include a 15.3% share in 2023, 18.9% in 2024, and a sharp drop to 1.5% in 2025. Entities listed are the top 5 ranked new products per year: 2023 (逆水寒, 崩坏：星穹铁道, 晶核, 冒险岛：枫之传说, 合金弹头：觉醒), 2024 (地下城与勇士：起源, 无尽冬日, 恋与深空, 三国：谋定天下, 向僵尸开炮), and 2025 (燕云十六声, 英雄没有闪, 无畏契约：源能行动, 杖剑传说, 永远的蔚蓝星球). A figure is present for 2025, featuring a pie chart visualizing the annual proportion alongside a ranked list with product icons for cross-year comparison. Evidence types consist of quantitative percentage metrics, ordered ranked lists, and proprietary research/data visualization by 点点数据. No definitions, procedures, claims, or tables are present in this section.
